title: The fund with your family name on it
subtitle: A short visualisation for building the felt sense of wealth that passes forward across generations.
excerpt: A five-minute visualisation from Day 41 of the MONEY program. The scene: a fund account with your family name, a balance that grows across decades, and the faces of people who benefit from it long after you.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Creative visualisation as a self-development tool draws on public-domain traditions.

content.text: A five-minute visualisation from the Day 41 theme. The image is a fund: named, growing, passing forward.
Sit or lie down. Close your eyes. One slow breath.
Picture a fund account, a savings or investment account with your family's name on it. It exists today, even if it is small. It has a balance, a date it was opened, a purpose.
Now watch it forward in time. Ten years: the balance is significantly larger. Twenty years: larger still. The contributions have compounded. The account has run without drama.
Now picture the people who will eventually benefit from this fund. You may not know their faces. You know they come after you. They start from a different place because you built this.
Notice what your body does with that image. Let it settle. The fund exists because you decided to start it.
Hold that image for two minutes. Then open your eyes.
Original to homemade.education. The shape draws on a long line of visualisation work used in self-help.
